content:
I also think it’s important that Phoenix’s journey is one of love and sacrifice. She isn’t just traveling for herself; she is doing it for her grandson. Even though she is old and frail, she never complains or turns back. Her selflessness makes her character inspiring because it shows the power of love and dedication.

Overall, I think Welty does a great job using symbolism to highlight Phoenix’s perseverance. Her journey may be long and difficult, but it proves how strong and determined she truly is.
